headline: SpaceX, OpenAI Windfall Fuels Bets on Next-Wave Asian AI Winners
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The hunt is on for companies that could benefit from the tailwinds of an unprecedented wave of stock offerings in the US, and investors are increasingly honing in on the Asian supply chain.Most Read from BloombergUS Says Deals With Iran for Safe Hormuz Transit Are ProhibitedAmericans Injured in Iranian Missile Strike on Kuwaiti Air BaseStrait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to US HelpAmericans Hurt in Kuwait as Trump Sends Mixed Signals on WarCVS Returns Zepbound to Drug
